input.title: Upgrade react-dnd to hooks
input.body:
The current usage of react-dnd is through a legacy Higher Order Component. 

Upgrade react-dnd to the latest version and switch to hooks.

1. Convert HOC to hooks one component at a time (at v11).
   - [x] [DragAndDropThought](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/pull/2203)
   - [x] [DragAndDropSubThought](https://github.com/cybersemics/em/pull/2220)
   - [x] DragAndDropToolbarButton
   - [x] Favorites
   - [x] ShortcutRow
   - [x] QuickDropIcon
1. Upgrade one major version at a time until v16.
1. Refactor component hierarchy to better reflect new hook usage.
1. Switch enum DragAndDropType back to PascalCase.
